title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Maersk India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Maersk India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Logistics Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
